text: When the user says "ascii galaxy" or "/galaxy" they mean the pi TUI extension ~/.pi/agent/extensions/void-blackhole.ts, not the ~/Developer/galaxy website (which is the lensed-blackhole personal site).

When calling learn_heuristic, always supply the required basis field (user-confirmed, directly-observed, reproduced, or documented) attesting how the lesson was verified true, per DESIGN.md section 3 of the heuristics extension.
